author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(pagination): suggest accessibility improvments (algolia/instantsearch-specs#120)
body:
* feat(pagination): suggest accessibility improvments

The aria-label with page number was already implemented in most flavours, but is just the number.

https://www.a11ymatters.com/pattern/pagination/

We don't need aria-disabled as the disabled pages are already `span`, thus not interactive.

* Update content/widgets/pagination.md

Co-authored-by: Sarah Dayan <5370675+sarahdayan@users.noreply.github.com>
